SELECT sin(x + y) FROM (SELECT 1 AS x, 2 AS y);
SELECT sin(val) FROM test_values WHERE val > 0;
CREATE TABLE sin_table AS SELECT val, sin(val) as sine_value FROM test_values;
WITH (SELECT max(val) FROM test_values) AS max_val SELECT sin(max_val);
SELECT sin(x) FROM (SELECT val AS x FROM test_values WHERE val < 2);
